name: Toffee Chip Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Cream butter.
Add brown sugar and vanilla. Mix well.
Add flour and baking powder and mix until well blended.
2. Pat the dough evenly into an ungreased 9 x 13 inch baking pan.
Press down flat. Bake for 10-15 minutes, or until golden.
Remove from oven and cut while warm into triangles or 2-inch squares.
3. Prepare topping: Melt chocolate chips, butter, and water in a double boiler over hot water. Stir until smooth. Remove the top of the double boiler from the hot water. Let chocolate thicken slightly, then drop a large dollop into the center of each square or triangle.
4. Sprinkle Bits 'o Brickle baking chips heavily on top of the wet chocolate.
Refrigerate to set. Remove squares with a spatula and shake off excess Bits 'o Brickle.
